---
title: "Research"
format: html
---

---

Few selected publications are given below. You can find the latest list of publications in my [Google Scholar page.](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=NQtqemwAAAAJ&hl=en)


<div class="year-header">2026</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Learning Physical Operators using Neural Operators</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Ander Gray, Daniel Giles, Lorenzo Zanisi, Matt J. Kusner, Timo Betcke, Stanislas Pamela, Marc Peter Deisenroth — <em>AISTATS, 2026</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">OpsSplit introduces a physics-informed machine learning framework that decomposes partial differential equations into fixed linear approximations and learned non-linear neural operators within a Neural ODE, delivering superior generalization to unseen physics, parameter efficiency, and interpretability.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.23113" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/gitvicky/NOs_for_POs" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/physop_learning.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>


<div class="year-header">2025</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Calibrated Physics-Informed Uncertainty Quantification</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Ander Gray, Lorenzo Zanisi, Timothy Nunn, Daniel Giles, Matt J. Kusner, Stanislas Pamela, Marc Peter Deisenroth — <em>ICML, 2025</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Calibrated uncertainty quantification of neural PDE solvers using physics residual errors as non-conformity scores for data-free conformal prediction.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://openreview.net/pdf?id=Z2uLBBck2X" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/gitvicky/CP-PRE" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/jorek_pre.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="year-header">2024</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Uncertainty Quantification of Surrogate Models using Conformal Prediction</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Ander Gray, Joel Oskarsson, Lorenzo Zanisi, Daniel Giles, Matt J. Kusner, Stanislas Pamela, Marc Peter Deisenroth — <em>arXiv preprint arXiv:2408.09881, 2024</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Guaranteed and valid error bars across spatio-temporal domains using conformal prediction.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.09881" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/gitvicky/Spatio-Temporal-CP" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/heatmap_cp.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Valid Error Bars for Neural Weather Models using Conformal Prediction</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Ander Gray, Joel Oskarsson, Lorenzo Zanisi, Stanislas Pamela, Daniel Giles, Matt J. Kusner, Marc Peter Deisenroth — <em>arXiv preprint arXiv:2406.14483, 2024</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Marginal conformal prediction as a method of guaranteed error bars across neural weather models.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.14483" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/gitvicky/neural-lam-CP" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/weather_cp.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Plasma Surrogate Modelling using Fourier Neural Operators</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Stanislas Pamela, Lorenzo Zanisi, Zongyi Li, Ander Gray, Daniel Brennand, Nitesh Bhatia, Gregory Stathopoulos, Matt Kusner, Marc Peter Deisenroth, Anima Anandkumar, JOREK Team, MAST Team — <em>Nuclear Fusion, Volume 64, Number 5, 2024</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Multi-variable FNO designed to model the plasma evolution within a Tokamak across both simulations and experiment on the MAST Tokamak.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/1741-4326/ad313a/meta" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/Plasma-FNO" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/fno_plasma.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="year-header">2023</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Fourier-RNNs for Modelling Noisy Physics Data</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Lorenzo Zanisi, Stanislas Pamela — <em>arXiv preprint arXiv:2302.06534, 2023</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Recurrent Fourier neural operators with hidden state representations for non-Markovian physical modelling.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.06534" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/F_RNNs.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Loss Landscape Engineering via Data Regulation on PINNs</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Stanislas Pamela, Debasmita Samaddar — <em>Machine Learning with Applications, Volume 12, 2023</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Impact Data-Regulation has on smoothening the loss landscape of physics-informed neural networks for better convergence.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2666827023000178" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
<a href="https://github.com/gitvicky/Loss_Landscape_PINNs" class="btn-code" target="_blank">Code</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/loss_landscape.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>

<div class="year-header">2022</div>

<div class="pub-card">
<div class="pub-content">
<div class="pub-title">Image Mapping the Temporal Evolution of Edge Characteristics in Tokamaks using Neural Networks</div>
<div class="pub-authors">Vignesh Gopakumar, Debasmita Samaddar — <em>Machine Learning: Science and Technology, Volume 1, Number 1, 2020</em></div>
<div class="pub-tldr">Branched fully convolutional network designed to emulate the plasma at the scrape-off layer with coupled plasma and neutral behaviour.</div>
<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://iopscience.iop.org/article/10.1088/2632-2153/ab5639/meta" class="btn-paper" target="_blank">Paper</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="pub-image">

![](Images/solps_cnn.png){.lightbox}

</div>
</div>
